violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Dish employee did not wash hands between handling dirty and clean dishes.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area. Observed dish employee eating in the kitchen.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The entire hood and hood filters is due for deep cleaning.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. A 3 compartment sink in the basement was being used to prepare potatoes without the proper air gap.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
